title: SsoFast EvaGreen qPCR
description: Bio-Rad EvaGreen dye fast 20 uL qPCR: 30 sec Sso7d activation, ultrafast 1-5 sec cycling, 65-95 C melt curve.

final.name: Melt curve: 65 to 95 C, 0.5 C increments

payload.notes: EvaGreen dsDNA-binding dye chemistry (fast); run the melt curve (65 to 95 C in 0.5 C increments, 2-5 sec/step) to confirm specificity. Recommended primer concentration is 500 nM each (final). The Sso7d-fusion polymerase fully activates within 30 sec at 95 C; for genomic DNA use a 98 C 2 min activation and 98 C denaturation. Anneal/extend at 60-65 C. 30-40 cycles. The base supermix contains no ROX; on the ABI 7500 Fast add ROX to 0.75x final. Source: SsoFast EvaGreen Supermix instruction manual (Bio-Rad 10014647), https://www.bio-rad.com/webroot/web/pdf/lsr/literature/10014647A.pdf
